mapper.select: SELECT rno, replyText, replyer, replydate, updatedate, delflag, num FROM treply WHERE num = #{num} AND delflag = false ORDER BY rno ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO treply (replyText, replyer, num) VALUES (#{replyText}, #{replyer}, #{num})
mapper.update: UPDATE treply SET delflag = true WHERE rno = #{rno}
